description_long: This is a bag of Calbee Potato Chips with a seaweed flavor, featuring a glossy, crinkled plastic exterior. The front of the bag is dominated by bold white and red text, with 'Calbee' and 'POTATO CHIPS' above a bright orange 'SEAWEED' label. The lower section of the front displays images of potato chips and seaweed, along with a small cartoon mascot. The back of the bag is mostly white, containing detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and product details in black text. The sides of the bag show the transition between the black front and white back, with visible seams and the continuation of the branding. The bag appears partially filled, giving it a puffy, air-cushioned appearance typical of snack packaging.
description: A glossy, crinkled plastic bag of Calbee Potato Chips, seaweed flavor, with bold branding and colorful graphics on the front and detailed nutritional labeling on the back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the crinkled edge of the bag, partial visibility of the chips and seaweed graphics, and a glimpse of the nutritional label.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the white surface with detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and product details in black text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the black upper section, part of the Calbee logo, and the seaweed image wrapping around the side.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the bold 'Calbee POTATO CHIPS SEAWEED' branding, colorful graphics of chips and seaweed, and a cartoon mascot.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Calbee' brand logo is prominently displayed on the front and back of the bag in bold white letters on a black background, with a red banner and yellow highlights.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'SEAWEED' is printed in large orange letters on the front, accompanied by images of seaweed and potato chips.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel and ingredients list are visible on the back of the bag in black text.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A small cartoon mascot is present on the front lower right, depicted as a yellow character with a chef's hat and a smiling face.
